message:
Fix ESM syntax error by removing shebang from bundle

The shebang was causing 'Invalid or unexpected token' when Node
tried to import the bundled file. Tested locally - server starts
successfully.

files.patch:
@@ -11,7 +11,7 @@
     "start": "node dist/index.js",
     "dev": "tsx watch src/index.ts",
     "build": "tsc && npm run bundle",
-    "bundle": "esbuild src/index.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --outfile=dist/index.js --banner:js='#!/usr/bin/env node' --external:fsevents",
+    "bundle": "esbuild src/index.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --outfile=dist/index.js --external:fsevents",
     "clean": "rm -rf dist"
   },
   "engines": {
